title: Sworn Relation of Karam

sections.body:
I lost the post a year ago. I have moved on. I was in the kitchen with three others till 23:00.

Entered as sober truth, though truth oft weareth a counterfeit coat. The constables disputed the matter till dawn: whether the witness erred, dissembled, or sought by falsehood to shield a greater villainy.

The phrasing is too neat by half, which in murder-books is seldom a happy omen. The desk-note beneath it read only: “keep apart from the louder papers.”

subtitle: Marked reliable by the clerk who was himself twice found mistaken.
